creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: lifanov
Date: Mon Mar  6 18:30:11 UTC 2017
New revision: 435563
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/435563

Log:
  devel/libsearpc - move python to PYTHONPATH

  This patch is to move libsearpc to PYTHONPATH instead of residing in the seafile directory. This was overlooked when moving the client seafile ports which require it for the cli.

  PR:		217539
  Submitted by:	ultima1252@gmail.com

Changes:
  head/devel/libsearpc/Makefile
  head/devel/libsearpc/pkg-plist
